budgetNote: User requested max OpenRouter spend of EUR 0.50; runner used a USD cap of 0.54.
notes: No API key is stored in this repository.
Frames were extracted from Grok videos, scored for anchor/body stability, centralized to 94x94, and exported through .piskel/runtime sheets.
The miner is a separate selectable sandbox character and does not use the living-drill forward-commit behavior.
